verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have come to recognise that my near kinsman is you. Though there be one nearer You were the only one willing and able to take my through. I thank you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We have come to recognise that our near kinsman is you. Though there be one nearer You were the only one willing and able to take us through. we thank you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the miracle 2x In our lives And we thank you. Lord we thank you We have safely made it through because of you.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In our darkest conditions when the burdens are hard to bear, we look to you And we thank you. Lord we thank you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We find strength to make it through, because of you. Despite the conditions, we are believing for our loved ones. The restorer of life is you And we thank you. Lord we thank you They will safely make it through because of you.
